data.title: Helium Evolution secures $8.3M convertible note and reveals Q2-2025 results.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that a significant number of new jobs have been created in the economy. The latest data reveals that over 300,000 jobs have been added in various sectors across the country. This increase has been attributed to a rise in consumer spending and business investments. Additionally, the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a decrease of 1.2% from the previous quarter. This positive trend is expected to continue in the coming months, providing more opportunities for job seekers and contributing to the overall growth of the economy.

data.title: Ether price drops below key trend line, prompting speculation of 10% decrease.
data.description: A recent report indicated that approximately 3.5 million people in the country are currently unemployed, accounting for a 6.7% unemployment rate. This represents a slight increase compared to the previous quarter. The report also highlighted that around 1.2 million new jobs were created during the same period. Additionally, the average income per capita has shown a slight decrease of 2.3% compared to last year. Experts suggest that the economic recovery is progressing at a slower pace than anticipated due to various factors, including global market conditions and domestic policies. The government is aiming to implement new measures to stimulate job growth and improve income levels in the coming months.

data.title: Newcore Gold announces 2,815,000 stock options, 1,880,000 restricted share units, 525,000 performance share units granted to employees. Stock options priced at $0.64/share for 5 years.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on August 29, 2025, Newcore Gold Ltd. (TSX-V: NCAU, OTCQX: NCAUF) has disclosed the allocation of its annual equity incentive awards. The company has provided a total of 2,815,000 stock options, 1,880,000 restricted share units, and 525,000 performance share units to its employees, consultants, directors, and executives. These awards, collectively termed as "Equity Incentive Awards," have been distributed at a price of $0.64 per share and come with a validity period of five years. The grant is contingent upon regulatory approval, falls under the firm's long-term incentive strategy, and adheres to specific vesting conditions.

data.title: FDA approves LEQEMBI IQLIK injection for Alzheimer's maintenance dosing, launching on Oct 6, 2025 in the U.S.
data.description: Introducing LEQEMBI IQLIK, the initial anti-amyloid therapy providing an option for patients and caregivers to administer injections from the comfort of their homes. Following a recommended treatment duration of 18 months, LEQEMBI IQLIK is set for release on October 6th, 2025, solely in the United States. This groundbreaking treatment aims to support individuals managing this persistent and advancing disease beyond the first phase of care.

data.title: HBAR price declines by 4.5%, testing critical support at $0.23. Hedera nears lower Bollinger Band, RSI at 43.25.
data.description: The value of HBAR has decreased to $0.23 due to a bearish market trend, with Hedera nearing the lower Bollinger Band support level. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates neutral conditions at a reading of 43.25.

data.title: Rivalry Corp's Q2 2025 results show record performance with net revenue up 24% to $1.6 million, expenses down 62%, and net loss narrowing by 59%. Key metrics include 1.5 month customer acquisition cost payback and approximately $600,000 monthly operating expenses. Player monetization is at all-time highs, with net revenue per player up by 49% from the previous quarter, wagers per player increasing by 7%, monthly deposits per player up by 28%, and deposit frequency per player rising by 22%.
data.description: Rivalry Corp. announced its financial results for the second quarter of 2025, highlighting a 24% increase in net revenue to $1.6 million from the previous quarter. Operating expenses decreased by 62% year-over-year to $3.6 million, resulting in a narrowed net loss of $2.19 million, down 59% compared to the same period in 2024. Customer Acquisition Cost payback improved to 1.5 months in the first half of 2025. Adjusted operating metrics showed the company operating closer to breakeven, with adjusted G&A expenses at $1.7 million and adjusted Technology and Content expenses at $440,000. Record player economics were achieved with a 49% increase in net revenue per player, 7% rise in wagers per player, 28% increase in monthly deposits per player, and 22% climb in deposit frequency per player. These improvements were attributed to a stronger product, player segmentation, and platform engagement. This marks the company's progress towards profitability and efficiency in its business model restructuring.

data.title: Affirm beats Q4 earnings estimates, surges on strong 2026 GMV guidance. Shares rise amid Walmart concerns.
data.description: In the latest financial report, Affirm Holdings exceeded earnings expectations for the fourth fiscal quarter. Following this positive performance, Affirm's stock saw an increase, with a forecasted Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) for 2026 surpassing anticipated levels. The company's promising guidance resulted in a surge in shares. This uptick in stock value comes amidst concerns regarding the impact of Walmart's recent developments.

data.title: WNS shareholders approve acquisition by Capgemini in New York, London, and Mumbai.
data.description: An acquisition by Capgemini has been approved by WNS shareholders in New York, London, and Mumbai. The overwhelming support for the acquisition signifies a significant development in the business world. The details of the acquisition, including important numbers and further implications, were not provided in the news.
